Packed with features for core CRM activities helping you build strong customer relationships.

WhatsApp Us For CRM ERP Capture Every Lead Our CRM ERP Software centralizes lead capture from diverse sources such as emails, chats, and web forms into a single, unified queue. By consolidating all leads in one location, the software enhances your ability to organize and manage sales efforts effectively. It simplifies pipeline reviews, ensuring no follow-ups are overlooked and boosting overall productivity. This streamlined approach enables your team to concentrate on converting leads into satisfied customers, improving conversion rates and fostering stronger customer relationships. With our CRM ERP, you can optimize your sales process and achieve better outcomes with greater efficiency.

Capture Every Lead

Our CRM ERP Software centralizes lead capture from diverse sources such as emails, chats, and web forms into a single, unified queue. By consolidating all leads in one location, the software enhances your ability to organize and manage sales efforts effectively. It simplifies pipeline reviews, ensuring no follow-ups are overlooked and boosting overall productivity. This streamlined approach enables your team to concentrate on converting leads into satisfied customers, improving conversion rates and fostering stronger customer relationships. With our CRM ERP, you can optimize your sales process and achieve better outcomes with greater efficiency.

Nurture Deals Closure

Our CRM consolidates all deal information into a single, centralized platform, offering your sales team a detailed and organized view of every opportunity. It enables you to send personalized emails to prospects, capture comprehensive notes on their specific needs, and create automated follow-up tasks to prevent any detail from being missed. Easily visualize your sales pipeline with clear stages, helping you prioritize the most promising deals at the right time. Collaborate seamlessly with your team through comment threads, ensuring everyone remains aligned and up-to-date. This integrated approach enhances efficiency, communication, and overall sales performance.

Never Miss a Call Detail

Calls offer a personal touch that emails and texts canÃƒÆ’Ã†â€™Ãƒâ€ Ã¢â‚¬â„¢ÃƒÆ’Ã¢â‚¬Å¡Ãƒâ€šÃ‚Â¢ÃƒÆ’Ã†â€™Ãƒâ€šÃ‚Â¢ÃƒÆ’Ã‚Â¢ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â‚¬Å¡Ã‚Â¬Ãƒâ€¦Ã‚Â¡ÃƒÆ’Ã¢â‚¬Å¡Ãƒâ€šÃ‚Â¬ÃƒÆ’Ã†â€™Ãƒâ€šÃ‚Â¢ÃƒÆ’Ã‚Â¢ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â‚¬Å¡Ã‚Â¬Ãƒâ€¦Ã‚Â¾ÃƒÆ’Ã¢â‚¬Å¡Ãƒâ€šÃ‚Â¢t match, but managing them can become chaotic. Frappe CRM streamlines this process by allowing you to make calls directly from the platform. It lets you record important conversations for future reference and link detailed notes directly to these recordings. This integration eliminates the hassle of switching between different tools and ensures every detail from your sales calls is captured and easily accessible. By keeping all your call-related information in one place, you can focus on building strong relationships with prospects and closing more deals efficiently.

Connect Leads via WhatsApp

In todayÃƒÆ’Ã†â€™Ãƒâ€ Ã¢â‚¬â„¢ÃƒÆ’Ã¢â‚¬Å¡Ãƒâ€šÃ‚Â¢ÃƒÆ’Ã†â€™Ãƒâ€šÃ‚Â¢ÃƒÆ’Ã‚Â¢ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â‚¬Å¡Ã‚Â¬Ãƒâ€¦Ã‚Â¡ÃƒÆ’Ã¢â‚¬Å¡Ãƒâ€šÃ‚Â¬ÃƒÆ’Ã†â€™Ãƒâ€šÃ‚Â¢ÃƒÆ’Ã‚Â¢ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â‚¬Å¡Ã‚Â¬Ãƒâ€¦Ã‚Â¾ÃƒÆ’Ã¢â‚¬Å¡Ãƒâ€šÃ‚Â¢s digital age, WhatsApp has become a preferred communication tool due to its convenience. However, managing conversations across different apps, searching for information, and manually logging chats can be time-consuming and inefficient. Our CRM ERP Software integrates WhatsApp communication directly into your CRM system, allowing you to interact with leads and customers through a seamless, user-friendly interface. You can send media, receive real-time notifications, and maintain all chat history within the CRM. This integration enhances your ability to connect with clients on their preferred platform, streamlining your sales process and boosting overall efficiency.

Maintain Excellent Sales Hygiene

Frappe CRM ensures top-notch sales hygiene by automating lead and deal assignments based on criteria such as region, deal size, or source, guaranteeing that each sales rep gets the right leads. Set Service Level Agreements (SLAs) to ensure prompt responses, demonstrating to leads that you value their time and building trust from the start. In-app notifications keep you updated on comments, mentions, and WhatsApp messages, ensuring you never miss crucial updates. Additionally, customizable views of your leads and deals, with advanced filters and sorting options, streamline your sales pipeline, allowing you to focus on high-priority tasks and opportunities.

CRM ERP Software

empowers your sales team to efficiently manage and enhance every aspect of your customer engagement process.
